PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?driver ?driverLabel WHERE {
  ?driver wdt:P106 wd:Q10841764 .
  ?driver wdt:P27 wd:Q111 .
  ?driver wdt:P447 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P577 ?startYear .
  ?team wdt:P576 ?endYear .
  FILTER(YEAR(?startYear) <= 1991)
  FILTER(YEAR(?endYear) >= 1986)
  ?driver wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?birthDate)
LIMIT 1
